description: Closeout track for the Prisma → Drizzle migration program. Cleans up comment-only Prisma references in reading-advantage and science-advantage enums.ts, corrects doc drift in AGENTS.md, distills program-level lessons-learned, and carves out the primary-advantage migration into its own follow-up track.
deviation_notes: Unblocked 2026-05-26 after Tracks 2 and 3 archived. Scope narrowed: primary-advantage carved out into separate follow-up track (Track-2/3-sized effort that does not fit 'slice cleanup' framing). Original AC 'no Prisma anywhere in monorepo' deferred to that follow-up track.
